# UX Checklist: Deduplicate open-data entities

**Purpose**: Validate maintainer UI for deduplication runs, QA, and failures.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/021-deduplicate-open-data/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Run Visibility

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Run list shows status, trigger type, entity types, and timestamps.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 QA summary (count reduction, over-merge flags, distance violations) is visible per run.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Review candidate and rejection counts are visible in run details.

## Failure & Warnings

- [x] CHK-UX-004 UI shows actionable failure details for QA failures or publication failures.
- [x] CHK-UX-005 UI clarifies that production canonical entities remain unchanged after failures.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-006 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Deduplication", "Review candidates", "Publication").
- [x] CHK-UX-007 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
